# Open Source Alternatives Hub

> Find open-source alternatives to popular AI tools across 20 languages. Compare features, pricing, and community support for alternatives to ChatGPT, Midjourney, GitHub Copilot, and more.

## Site Overview
- AI tools covered: 100+
- Supported languages: 20
- Page types: alternatives, comparisons, categories, guides
- Base URL: https://alternatives.ai-term-hub.com/

## Important Pages
- [Home](https://alternatives.ai-term-hub.com/)
- [All Alternatives](https://alternatives.ai-term-hub.com/en/alternatives/)
- [Categories](https://alternatives.ai-term-hub.com/en/categories/)
- [Comparisons](https://alternatives.ai-term-hub.com/en/compare/)
- [Guides](https://alternatives.ai-term-hub.com/en/guides/)
- [Sitemap](https://alternatives.ai-term-hub.com/sitemap.xml)
